mission: Reduce the final puncture-U(1) Paper 35 frontier by absorbing the fermionic U(1) charge into the line-bundle degree at the index level.

theorem_1_charge_absorption.statement: For a U(1) line bundle L over S^2 and an integer fermionic charge q, coupling the fermionic bridge to L with charge q is equivalent at the twisted-Dirac/index level to coupling unit charge to the associated bundle L^q. Therefore the separate data (L, q) collapse to the single integer degree n = q c1(L)[S^2].

theorem_2_final_integer_frontier.status: derived / strongest exact current frontier reduction
theorem_2_final_integer_frontier.statement: The last live positive Paper 35 Q5 route reduces to one exact integer: the degree n_punct seen by the fermionic bridge in the puncture-U(1) sector. All remaining line-bundle/charge ambiguity is absorbed into that single index integer.

final_boundary.status: derived / strongest current Paper 35 final exact boundary
final_boundary.safe_statement: Paper 35 is now reduced to one exact unresolved integer on the current route: the puncture-U(1) index degree n_punct seen by the fermionic bridge. Without a theorem deriving n_punct ≠ 0 from the full puncture-resolved horizon algebra, baryogenesis remains closed on the current stack.
